title: MAXAR_image_ortho image extension
description: glTF extension that allows specifying an image as being orthographically projected

transform.description: 2x3 affine transformation matrix for converting from pixel coordinates to world coordinates. Matrix elements are stored as [a, b, c, d, e, f] representing the transformation matrix [[a, c, e], [b, d, f]]. All six values must be finite JSON numbers; null, NaN, Infinity, and -Infinity are not allowed.
